svg.text: Request drive enable from the manual Enable bit
Both target angles within the soft limits?
Accept a manual move (enabled, homed, in-limits) on the rising edge
Move requested while not enabled -> fault (5)
Move requested while not homed -> fault (6)
Execute the accepted move on both shoulders
Both axes in position -> acknowledge, clear the move
Moving status while a move is active
Abort stops motion and clears the move
